description: You are designing a sheet metal L-bracket profile in SolveSpace. Sharp corners are not acceptable due to stress concentrations, so you must add a smooth fillet (tangent arc) at the inside corner. Create a sketch containing a horizontal line segment and a vertical line segment (each at least 25 mm long) forming an approximate 90° corner. Add an arc constrained to be tangent to both lines with a diameter of exactly 20 mm. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/fillet_profile.slvs.
